caption:
10 fun indoor attractions to visit this summer in Dubai

1. Ski Dubai
🎟️ 220 AED for Snow Park Pass

2. Museum of the Future
🎟️ 149 AED

3. Sky Views Observatory
🎟️ 80 AED for glass walk and slide 

4. Dubai Aquarium
🎟️ starts at 199 AED

5. Madame Tussauds
🎟️ 145 AED

6. Dubai Butterfly Garden
🎟️ 55 AED

7. IMG Worlds of Adventure 
🎟️ 345 AED General Park Admission 

8. The Green Planet
🎟️ 160 AED

9. Mohammed Bin Rashid Library
🎟️ Free

10. AYA Universe
🎟️ 125 AED

For timings and current ticket prices, please check the attractions’ websites.

Save this for your Dubai trip!
